name: Saucy Pork n' Noodle Bake
recipeIngredient: 10 1/2 oz Cream of chicken soup, condensed
recipeInstructions:
1. Place 1 tablespoon butter in a deep, 1 1/2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 30 seconds.
2. Add pork and heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 2 minutes. Drain off excess fat.
3. Add remaining ingredients and mix well.
4. Heat, covered, in Microwave Oven for 12 to 15 minutes or until noodles are tender. Stir occasionally.
